## Summary

What changes, and why.

## Test plan

How to verify this works. Prefer concrete steps over assertions.

- [ ] `make check` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] Charter and `docs/` chapters still describe the system accurately

## Charter implications

Any change to the institutional mechanics in the `docs/` chapters
or the Charter itself? If yes, what changed and why.

## Notes

Anything else a reviewer should know: trade-offs, alternatives
considered, follow-ups intentionally left out of this PR.
